import yaml
from pathlib import Path

MANIFEST = Path\("trellis-library/manifest.yaml"\)
with open\(MANIFEST\) as f:
    manifest = yaml.safe_load\(f\)

# Fix the two pack entries
for asset in manifest["assets"]:
    if asset.get\("id"\) == "example.assembled-packs.electron-app-foundation":
        asset["domain_axis"] = "scenarios"
        asset["domain"] = "assembled-packs"
        asset["atomicity"] = "simple"
        asset["tags"] = ["example", "pack"]
        print\(f"Fixed: {asset['id']}"\)
    elif asset.get\("id"\) == "example.assembled-packs.nextjs-fullstack-foundation":
        asset["domain_axis"] = "scenarios"
        asset["domain"] = "assembled-packs"
        asset["atomicity"] = "simple"
        asset["tags"] = ["example", "pack"]
        print\(f"Fixed: {asset['id']}"\)

with open\(MANIFEST, "w", encoding="utf-8"\) as f:
    yaml.safe_dump\(manifest, f, sort_keys=False, allow_unicode=True, default_flow_style=False\)

print\("Done."\)

# Verify
with open\(MANIFEST\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

for id_ in ["example.assembled-packs.electron-app-foundation", "example.assembled-packs.nextjs-fullstack-foundation"]:
    idx = content.find\(id_\)
    print\(f"\\n--- {id_} ---"\)
    print\(content[idx:idx+400]\)
EOF)

Bash(/ops/softwares/python/bin/python3 - << 'EOF'
import yaml
from pathlib import Path

MANIFEST = Path\("trellis-library/manifest.yaml"\)
with open\(MANIFEST\) as f:
    manifest = yaml.safe_load\(f\)

# Get all electron and nextjs spec IDs
electron_ids = []
nextjs_ids = []
for asset in manifest.get\("assets", []\):
    aid = asset.get\("id", ""\)
    if "electron" in aid and aid.startswith\("spec."\):
        electron_ids.append\(aid\)
    elif "nextjs" in aid and aid.startswith\("spec."\):
        nextjs_ids.append\(aid\)

electron_ids.sort\(\)
nextjs_ids.sort\(\)
for eid in electron_ids:
    print\(f"  - {eid}"\)
print\(f"\\nTotal electron: {len\(electron_ids\)}"\)
for nid in nextjs_ids:
    print\(f"  - {nid}"\)
print\(f"\\nTotal nextjs: {len\(nextjs_ids\)}"\)
EOF)

import yaml
from pathlib import Path

MANIFEST = Path\("trellis-library/manifest.yaml"\)
with open\(MANIFEST\) as f:
    manifest = yaml.safe_load\(f\)

# Find malformed quality IDs
malformed = []
for asset in manifest.get\("assets", []\):
    aid = asset.get\("id", ""\)
    if " quality" in aid or aid.endswith\("quality"\):
        print\(f"Malformed: {aid!r}  path={asset.get\('path',''\)}"\)
        malformed.append\(aid\)
EOF)

import yaml
from pathlib import Path

MANIFEST = Path\("trellis-library/manifest.yaml"\)
with open\(MANIFEST\) as f:
    manifest = yaml.safe_load\(f\)

# Check quality IDs
for asset in manifest.get\("assets", []\):
    aid = asset.get\("id", ""\)
    if "quality" in aid and "electron" in aid or \("nextjs" in aid and "quality" in aid\):
        if asset.get\("format"\) == "file":
            print\(f"ID: {aid}"\)
            print\(f"  concern: {asset.get\('concern'\)}"\)
            print\(f"  path: {asset.get\('path'\)}"\)
            print\(\)
EOF)

Bash(/ops/softwares/python/bin/python3 - << 'EOF'
import yaml
from pathlib import Path

MANIFEST = Path\("trellis-library/manifest.yaml"\)
with open\(MANIFEST\) as f:
    manifest = yaml.safe_load\(f\)

for pack_id in ["pack.electron-app-foundation", "pack.nextjs-fullstack-foundation"]:
    for p in manifest.get\("packs", []\):
        if p.get\("id"\) == pack_id:
            assets = p.get\("selection", {}\).get\("assets", []\)
            print\(f"=== {pack_id} ==="\)
            print\(f"  title: {p.get\('title'\)}"\)
            print\(f"  summary: {p.get\('summary'\)}"\)
            print\(f"  project_types: {p.get\('applicability', {}\).get\('project_types'\)}"\)
            print\(f"  asset count: {len\(assets\)}"\)
            print\(\)
EOF)
